testsuite.name: PSPCardsIntegrations.monnetPeru

testcase.name: purchase
testcase.system-out: Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 500.0 ⚠ Amount outside valid range (10.0–100.0). Provided: 500.0. Using safe fallback value. Generated First Name: john299 Generated Email: nairobiPalermo59d12@gmail.com select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- PEN select merchant name :- Visa Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully purchaseId is not null purchaseId is not empty purchaseId format is valid: 699551c269e2a855582bd137 purchaseId length is 24 purchaseId validated successfully: 699551c269e2a855582bd137 Entered Card Holder Name: Nitendra Gautam Entered Card Number: 4051 8856 0044 6623 Entered Card Expiry Date: 10/28 Entered Card CVV: 123 Moved to the Pay button Clicked on the Pay button to proceed with payment Redirected URL: https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=false Payment Failed

testsuite.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 500.0 ⚠ Amount outside valid range (10.0–100.0). Provided: 500.0. Using safe fallback value.
